exercises.title: General Notes & Warm-Up
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Home Gym — Power Week

Hypertrophy finish: Gym Monster 2 cable block (60 s between moves; complete at GM2 without returning to calisthenics station).

Power triples: ~85–90% of today's best triple; 1 RIR on the first 2 work sets. Do not superset power work.

Skills / holds: pick a level with clean positions and 1–2 s in reserve on timed holds.

General warm-up (every day):
Band Pull-Aparts — 1x10; Band Dislocates — 1x10; Banded Scapular Protraction — 1x10; Banded Shoulder External Rotation — 1x10; Banded One-Arm Triceps Overhead Press — 1x10 per side; Banded RDLs — 1x10; Banded Bent-Over Rows — 1x10; Banded Squat to Press — 1x10; Quadruped Thoracic Rotation — 1x10 per side.

Power ramp (weighted pull/chin/dip): bodyweight × 5, light load × 3, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets. Rest 3–4 min on power work.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-homegym for progression, tempo/volume week rules, and skill ladders.

exercises.title: Weighted Dip
exercises.notes:
Power: 3x3 (belted). Rest 3–4 min.
Pause variation on Push B day (see that routine).
Ramp: bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets.

exercises.title: Iron Cross Hold Progression
exercises.notes: Skill superset A1: 3x10 s iron cross progression. Then A2 with minimal rest. 60–75 s after A2 before next round.

exercises.title: Pike Handstand Push-Up (elevated feet)
exercises.notes: Skill superset A2: Pike HSPU elevated 3x3. Paired with iron cross hold; 60–75 s rest after this exercise each round.

exercises.title: Bulgarian Split Squat (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3x8/side. Superset with chest fly; 0 s before H2; 60–75 s after H2 each round.

exercises.title: Chest Fly (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3x12. End of push/leg–chest pair.

exercises.title: Leg Extension (Machine)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H3: 3x12 quad isolation. Superset with hammer curl; balances arms vs prior push days.

exercises.title: Hammer Curl (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H4: 3x12. End of quad–biceps pair.

exercises.title: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Abs: 3x15. Single exercise; 60 s before next round if repeating.

exercises.title: Warmup: Pull - Power Week
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Home Gym — Power Week

Hypertrophy finish: Gym Monster 2 cable block (60 s between moves; complete at GM2 without returning to calisthenics station).

Power triples: ~85–90% of today's best triple; 1 RIR on the first 2 work sets. Do not superset power work.

Skills / holds: pick a level with clean positions and 1–2 s in reserve on timed holds.

General warm-up (every day):
Band Pull-Aparts — 1x10; Band Dislocates — 1x10; Banded Scapular Protraction — 1x10; Banded Shoulder External Rotation — 1x10; Banded One-Arm Triceps Overhead Press — 1x10 per side; Banded RDLs — 1x10; Banded Bent-Over Rows — 1x10; Banded Squat to Press — 1x10; Quadruped Thoracic Rotation — 1x10 per side.

Power ramp (weighted pull/chin/dip): bodyweight × 5, light load × 3, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets. Rest 3–4 min on power work.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-homegym for progression, tempo/volume week rules, and skill ladders.

exercises.title: Pull Up (Weighted)
exercises.notes:
Power: 3x3. Rest 3–4 min. Progress +2.5 kg after a clean 3x3.
Ramp: bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets.

exercises.title: Front Lever Hold (Rings)
exercises.notes: Skill giant B1: Front lever hold rings 3x12 s. Then B2 → B3 minimal rest; 60–75 s after B3.

exercises.title: Deadlift High Pull
exercises.notes: Skill giant B2: Deadlift high pull 3x5 (or KB/band per program). 60–75 s after tuck row each round.

exercises.title: Inverted Row
exercises.notes: Skill giant B3: Tuck front-lever row 3x5. Last move in giant set—rest 60–75 s before next round.

exercises.title: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3x15 rear delt / external rotation. Superset with cable row; 60–75 s after H2.

exercises.title: Seated Cable Row - Bar Grip
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3x10 mid-back row.

exercises.title: Straight Arm Lat Pulldown (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H3: 3x15 lats. Superset with bicep curl; spreads elbow flexor work onto Pull A.

exercises.title: Bicep Curl (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H4: 3x12.

exercises.title: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Abs: 3x12.

exercises.title: Warm Up
exercises.notes: Conditioning day — steady HR. Circuit ×3 rounds (rest 60–90 s between rounds); then EMOM 12 (odd: jumping jacks 45 s, even: band straight-arm pulldown 15 reps); L-sit accumulate 60 s; V-ups 3x20. Adjust set counts in app if you prefer separate logging per round.

exercises.title: Ring Row
exercises.notes: Circuit round 1/3: Ring row 15 reps. Giant set with next 3 moves; 60–90 s after hollow rock.

exercises.title: Shoulder Press (Dumbbell)
exercises.notes: Circuit: Band overhead press 15 reps (log as shoulder press template if needed).

exercises.title: Lunge
exercises.notes: Circuit: Split squat pattern 12 reps/side.

exercises.title: Hollow Rock
exercises.notes: Circuit: Hollow rock 20 s. End of round—rest 60–90 s before next round.

exercises.title: Jumping Jack
exercises.notes: EMOM odd minutes: 45 s work (log 6×45 s or merge as preferred).

exercises.title: Straight Arm Band Pulldown
exercises.notes: EMOM even minutes: 15 reps (6 sets for 12 min EMOM).

exercises.title: L-Sit Hold
exercises.notes: Finisher superset C1: L-sit accumulate 60 s (e.g. 4×15 s). Then C2 with minimal rest; 60–75 s after V-ups.

exercises.title: V Up
exercises.notes: Finisher superset C2: V-ups 3x20. 60–75 s after each round before next L-sit block if alternating.

exercises.title: General Notes & Warm-Up
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Home Gym — Power Week

Hypertrophy finish: Gym Monster 2 cable block (60 s between moves; complete at GM2 without returning to calisthenics station).

Power triples: ~85–90% of today's best triple; 1 RIR on the first 2 work sets. Do not superset power work.

Skills / holds: pick a level with clean positions and 1–2 s in reserve on timed holds.

General warm-up (every day):
Band Pull-Aparts — 1x10; Band Dislocates — 1x10; Banded Scapular Protraction — 1x10; Banded Shoulder External Rotation — 1x10; Banded One-Arm Triceps Overhead Press — 1x10 per side; Banded RDLs — 1x10; Banded Bent-Over Rows — 1x10; Banded Squat to Press — 1x10; Quadruped Thoracic Rotation — 1x10 per side.

Power ramp: weighted pull/chin/dip — bodyweight × 5, light × 3, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2. Bench — empty bar × 8–10, then ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, ~85% × 1, then work sets. Rest 3–4 min on power work.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-homegym for progression, tempo/volume week rules, and skill ladders.

exercises.title: Bench Press (Barbell)
exercises.notes: Power: 3x3 with 2 s pause on chest each rep. ~85–90% crisp triple, ~1 RIR on first 2 sets. Ramp: empty bar × 8–10, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, ~85% × 1, then work sets. Rest 3–4 min.

exercises.title: Chest-to-Wall Handstand Hold
exercises.notes: Handstand giant D1: Chest-to-wall hold ~25 s ×3. Then D2 → D3; 60–75 s after freestanding each round.

exercises.title: Wall Handstand Push-Up
exercises.notes: Handstand giant D2: Wall HSPU 3x3. 60–75 s after D3 before repeating.

exercises.title: Seated Shoulder Press (Machine)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3x8 overhead. Superset with incline press; 60–75 s after H2.

exercises.title: Incline Chest Press (Machine)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3x12 incline (not flat bench—power bench is separate).

exercises.title: Seated Leg Curl (Machine)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H3: 3x12 hamstrings. Superset with OH triceps—non-competing with shoulders/chest.

exercises.title: Overhead Triceps Extension (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H4: 3x15.

exercises.title: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Abs: 3x15.

exercises.title: Warmup: Pull - Power Week
exercises.notes:
Pull–Push Home Gym — Power Week

Hypertrophy finish: Gym Monster 2 cable block (60 s between moves; complete at GM2 without returning to calisthenics station).

Power triples: ~85–90% of today's best triple; 1 RIR on the first 2 work sets. Do not superset power work.

Skills / holds: pick a level with clean positions and 1–2 s in reserve on timed holds.

General warm-up (every day):
Band Pull-Aparts — 1x10; Band Dislocates — 1x10; Banded Scapular Protraction — 1x10; Banded Shoulder External Rotation — 1x10; Banded One-Arm Triceps Overhead Press — 1x10 per side; Banded RDLs — 1x10; Banded Bent-Over Rows — 1x10; Banded Squat to Press — 1x10; Quadruped Thoracic Rotation — 1x10 per side.

Power ramp (weighted pull/chin/dip): bodyweight × 5, light load × 3, ~50% × 3, ~70% × 2, then work sets. Rest 3–4 min on power work.

See programs/khoiphan21/push-pull-homegym for progression, tempo/volume week rules, and skill ladders.

exercises.title: Chin Up (Weighted)
exercises.notes: Power: 3x3. Same ramp style as weighted pull-up.

exercises.title: Muscle Up
exercises.notes: Skill superset E1: Muscle up warm-up 1×3 then 3x3. Then E2 archer pull-ups; 60–75 s after E2.

exercises.title: Archer Pull-Up
exercises.notes: Skill superset E2: Archer pull-up 3x4/side. 60–75 s after this exercise each round.

exercises.title: Front Lever Hold
exercises.notes: Skill superset F1: Back lever tuck 3x12 s (log on front lever hold). Then F2 Nordic; 60–75 s after F2.

exercises.title: Nordic Hamstrings Curls
exercises.notes: Skill superset F2: Nordic curl 3x6. Paired with back lever tuck.

exercises.title: Seated Cable Row - Bar Wide Grip
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H1: 3x10. Superset with reverse fly—alternate row pattern with rear delt (60–75 s after H2).

exercises.title: Rear Delt Reverse Fly (Cable)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H2: 3x15.

exercises.title: Iso-Lateral High Row (Machine)
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H3: 3x15 high row. Superset with cable crunch—avoids third straight horizontal pull without rest variety.

exercises.title: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Hypertrophy H4 / abs finisher: 3x12.
